result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone has reliable access to clean water, nutritious food, basic healthcare, and quality education—essentially eradicating extreme poverty so that every person can live a dignified, safe, and empowered life.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone has reliable access to clean water, nutritious food, basic healthcare, and quality education—essentially eradicating extreme poverty so that every person can live a dignified, safe, and empowered life.
